scope.summary: Interactive QR-code login using zca-rust API::login_qr. The Rust core runs the full QR flow, generates a stable per-account imei (ADR-0004), and assembles a reusable types::Credentials {imei, cookie, user_agent}. The UI shows a Zalo-PC-style QR modal driven by non-secret display events; the resulting credential triple never crosses the IPC boundary into the webview.
goals: zalo/ run_qr_login wraps API::login_qr, maps LoginQREvent -> non-secret display DTOs, generates a stable per-account imei, and produces types::Credentials from the QR cookie jar + user_agent

command/ start_qr_login streams QR display events (QRCodeGenerated image/code, QRCodeScanned avatar/name, expiry/declined/success) to the UI via a Tauri channel/event, and on success hands the credential triple to the in-process session store without serializing token values to the UI
Frontend QR modal renders the QR image, shows a countdown and auto-refreshes on expiry, previews the scanned avatar/name, and surfaces declined/success states
imei + cookie + user_agent stay in the core; only non-secret QR display data and AccountProfile reach the webview
nonGoals: Persisting the issued credential in the OS keychain (secure-cred-store)
Multi-account concurrency / account switcher UI (session-manager, account-switcher)
Patching zca-rust to emit GotLoginInfo / an upstream device imei (ADR-0004 defers this)

acceptance.description: zalo/ run_qr_login drives API::login_qr, generates a stable per-account imei, and assembles a valid types::Credentials from the QR result; LoginQREvents map to non-secret display DTOs (no token values).
command/ start_qr_login compiles and streams non-secret QR display events to the UI; the resulting credential triple is kept in the core (no imei/cookie/user_agent serialized across IPC).
Frontend builds with the QR modal (image render, expiry countdown/auto-refresh, scanned profile preview, declined/success states) wired to the event stream.
Live: a real phone scan completes QR login end-to-end and the app reaches the logged-in/listening state; only non-secret diagnostics are captured in evidence.
